title: G@shuwr #1650
definition:
Geshur or Geshurites = "proud beholder"

 1) a people
 2) a land in north Transjordania
nasbUsage:
Definition: Geshur or Geshurites = "proud beholder"

 1) a people
 2) a land in north Transjordania

    NASB:  a territory E. of the upper Jordan, also inhab. of Geshur
